criteria.description: Triggered by an API request to fetch user data.
criteria.name: api_request

transitions.description: Initiate the data ingestion process to retrieve users from the API.
transitions.end_state_description: The user data has been successfully retrieved from the API.
transitions.name: start_ingestion

process.description: Process to ingest raw data from the specified user API.
process.name: ingest_raw_data

transitions.start_state_description: Initial state before any data ingestion occurs.

transitions.name: add_user
transitions.description: Add a new user to the directory after retrieving from the API.
transitions.start_state_description: Initial state before adding any users.
transitions.end_state_description: A new user has been successfully added to the directory.

process.description: Process to handle the addition of a user to the directory.
process.name: process_user_data

transitions.name: update_directory
transitions.description: Update the directory with new user data when changes occur.
transitions.start_state_description: The directory already contains added users.
transitions.end_state_description: The directory has been updated with the latest user information.

process.description: Process to refresh and update the directory with new data.
process.name: refresh_data
